name: Deviled Peas in Toast Cup
recipeIngredient: 1/8 cup cream of mushroom soup, condensed
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion and green pepper in margarine until tender. Remove from heat.
2. Stir in soup, peas, and pimentos.
3. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
4. Remove crusts from bread; press each slice into a 6-ounce custard cup.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes, until golden brown.
6. Remove toast cups from cups.
7. Fill with pea mixture.
